title: HV commissioning gates 05L-B / 05L-C cleaned; 05M-A/B/C staged (zero-torque before spin)
summary: Codify corrected Gates 05L-B (first live current-limited pre-charge observation) and 05L-C (shutdown / discharge / repeatability) with ownership partition VCU=request/monitor, BMS/PDU=contactor+pre-charge owner, hardwired safety loop=emergency interruption. Stage 05M-A as inverter enable readiness / torque-disabled validation (not spin). Stage 05M-B and 05M-C as outlines only. Do not execute 05M until 05L-C is complete. All numeric thresholds are INITIAL_TARGET_PROFILE only.
corrections_applied: 05L-B-001: no absolute Vcaps=0.0V requirement; use leakage/noise threshold + supplier topology expectations
05L-B-002: RC curve is first-order model only; require supplier-approved pre-charge envelope
05L-B-004: timeout = fail to reach threshold before timeout expires (not counter crossing ≤limit)
05L-B-007: no 'instantly'; measure dropout vs supplier target; no automatic retry after E-stop
05L-C shutdown order: supplier-defined architecture (not universal Main+ then Main-)
05L-C IMD: approved rated current-limited fixture only; forbid ad-hoc live rail resistance insertion
05L-C-005 split into 005A false-positive and 005B false-negative weld checks
05M-A: torque-disabled readiness; do not assume 0% PWM; no intentional rotation / vehicle movement / driver torque authority
Staging: after 05L-C → 05M-A then 05M-B then 05M-C; do not jump to spin before 05M-A
recommended_next: Complete any remaining 05L-C supplier-spec attachments (shutdown architecture + IMD fixture method + weld bounce thresholds). Do not authorize Gate 05M-A live execution until 05L-C exit criteria and LIVE_HV_TEST_PLAN_APPROVAL are satisfied. Do not open 05M-B until 05M-A proves torque-disabled readiness.
